title: Integrate Preflight Review into startup flow

sources.reason: Startup entrypoint that should front-load Preflight Review.
Installed distributions must copy the startup preflight script.
Existing advisory/gate report generator reused by the startup flow.
Public Make target wiring for the startup and preflight flow.
Installed Make target wiring must stay in sync with the root Makefile.
Check catalog is the generic registry for the new preflight entrypoint.
End-to-end startup flow coverage for code-mode work items.
Coverage guard association for the ai-start lifecycle path.
Unit-level ai-start regression coverage for the startup preflight hook.

riskAssessment.reason: This change alters the startup path and Make wiring, but it reuses the existing Preflight Review engine and stays generic.

executionDecision.reason: The startup flow and its verification path are now explicit.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm the new startup hook stays advisory by default and only blocks when policy enables gating.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: make ai-preflight is exposed as the generic startup preflight entrypoint.
make ai-start in code mode generates and shows the Preflight Review before implementation begins.
The Preflight Review remains advisory by default and only blocks when policy explicitly enables gating.
Makefile, template Makefile, checks catalog, docs, and tests stay in sync with the new flow.
guidelines: Keep the startup hook generic and evidence-driven.
Prefer Makefile and checks catalog wiring over hard-coded policy in scripts.

intent.problem: AI Cockpit already has a standalone Preflight Review, but the startup path still lets implementation begin without surfacing the readiness evidence first.
constraints: Do not add new Contract fields or change Summary structure for the Preflight Review feature itself.
Default behavior must remain advisory-first and only block when policy explicitly enables gating.
Keep the signal derivation generic and grounded in Contract evidence.
intent.rationale: The implementation entrypoint should expose readiness and risk signals before coding starts so implicit assumptions are visible at the moment of handoff.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: code-mode ai-start generates and displays the Preflight Review before implementation
make ai-preflight stays advisory when gateEnabled is false
make ai-preflight fails only when gateEnabled is true and the report status is blocked

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: The user explicitly requested the startup-flow change across governance files and Makefile entrypoints.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
